# AvökatFinder Malta
> The English-language directory of lawyers and law firms in Malta for expats, foreign nationals and international businesses.

## Main Pages
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/: Home — find an English-speaking lawyer in Malta
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/lawyers/: Directory of verified law firms and lawyers in Malta
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/glossary/: Legal glossary — plain-English definitions of Malta legal terms
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/blog/: Expat legal guides and property law articles for Malta
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/about/: About AvökatFinder Malta
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/contact/: Contact us

## Legal Glossary Terms
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/glossary/affiliation-order/

- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/glossary/employment-law-malta/
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/glossary/konvenju-malta/
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/glossary/maintenance-order/
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/glossary/matrimonial-property/
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/glossary/residence-permit-malta/
- https://malta.avokatfinder.com/glossary/stamp-duty-malta/

## Site Info
- Language: English
- Audience: Expats, foreign nationals, international property buyers and businesses in Malta
- Content: Law firm directory, legal glossary, expat legal guides
- Last updated: 2026-04-30
- Sitemap: https://malta.avokatfinder.com/sitemap.xml
